sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76220" key="o)/xqan" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄχθαν</orth> (sic) <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῆς θαλάσσης</foreign> sea-<sense id="n76220.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shore</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:203" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.203</biblScope></bibl>.—Cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄχθος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
